name: pi-desktop
description: Pi Desktop Manager — Windows-first desktop GUI for Pi Coding Agent

scripts.build: pnpm --filter @pi-desktop/protocol run build && pnpm --filter @pi-desktop/pi-host run build && pnpm --filter @pi-desktop/desktop run build
scripts.typecheck: pnpm --filter @pi-desktop/protocol run build && pnpm --filter @pi-desktop/protocol run typecheck && pnpm --filter @pi-desktop/pi-host run typecheck && pnpm --filter @pi-desktop/desktop run typecheck
scripts.test: pnpm --filter @pi-desktop/protocol run build && pnpm -r --filter @pi-desktop/protocol --filter @pi-desktop/pi-host --filter @pi-desktop/desktop run test
scripts.verify:p0: pnpm verify:docs && pnpm typecheck && pnpm test
